notes: Korea and Taiwan assets share overlapping backend code — first valid submission wins, subsequent ones marked duplicate.
IDORs with unpredictable IDs must prove how the ID was obtained easily.
Use hacker email alias h1username@wearehackerone.com when signing up test accounts.
Do not discuss or disclose any findings without express consent.

out_of_scope.value: MiTM or physical device access attacks
Error messages or version information disclosure
Self-XSS or unlikely user interaction required
Issues Coupang is already aware of
IDOR with unpredictable ID where obtainability is not demonstrated

priority_targets: IDOR in order, cart, payment, and account flows
Business logic in checkout / coupon / refund flows
API authorization — horizontal and vertical privilege escalation
XSS in product listings, search, or review components
Leaked credentials or API keys in JS bundles / responses
